testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. null Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-GARLJAI', ip: '192.168.48.1' Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1'
